titleStmt.title: SII 9.138: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 138. (A.R. No. 464 of 1923.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE GARBHAGRIHA OF THE SANGAMESVARA TEMPLE AT SANGAMESVARA, A HAMLET OF SINGEPALLE, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 995, Pramādīcha, Chaitra, amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1073 March 10; f.d.t. ·64. The month was Pūrṇimānta. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Gōyindavāḍi and records that a grant of a field and two gardens were made for the ablution and other services of the god Saṅgamēśvaradēva of Kūḍal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśra
ya prithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatu tribhuva
namalladēvaru goṁdhavāḍiya
nelavīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadoḷācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ prithvīrājyaṁgeyyu
ttiralu sakavarṣa 995 ne
ya pramādīcasaṁvatsa
rada caitradamavāseyā
dityavāradaṁdu kūḍala sayaṁ
bhusaṁgamēsvaradēvargge visē
ṣapuṇyatithigaḷiṁ paṁcāmrita
snāna gandhānulēpa dhūpadīpa
nivēdya trikāḷārccitabhōga
kke haḷḷamosaraṁ biṭṭudu gō
yi(ṁ)ndavāḍiya saṁga
mēśvaradēvara nairityadalu
biṭṭa gayyaloṁdu 1 tōṭa 2
yilliyācāryya rudraśi
vana marma maṁgi sthānadoḍe
yanantappudakke goṁdavāḍiya
noḷabaṁgāvuṇḍanaṟiva . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundha
rāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā yāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
